final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing museum-style infographic for Chinese ethnic minority traditional costume, formatted as a National Museum exhibition panel.

Style/medium: National Museum exhibition panel, historical costume reference chart, cultural heritage infographic, restrained editorial design, rice paper texture background, archival print aesthetic
Composition: vertical infographic layout, full-body ethnic costume figure as central anchor, structured grid zones with generous margins, clean hierarchy
Subject: full-body traditional costume of a Chinese ethnic minority (automatically selected based on visual richness), standing figure wearing complete ensemble with layered garments, silver ornaments, embroidered details
Scene/backdrop: warm off-white paper texture background (rice paper, silk paper, pale tea tone), subtle aged paper grain, no distracting elements, museum display context implied
Lighting/mood: soft even diffused lighting, neutral daylight simulation, professional archival photography lighting, dignified and scholarly atmosphere
Color palette: warm off-white base, earth tones and natural dyes as anchors, muted jewel tones for costume accents, black text for annotations
Text (verbatim): "中国少数民族服饰"
Materials/textures: hand-woven cotton and linen textures, silk brocade with raised patterns, silver filigree metalwork, embroidered satin stitches, batik wax-resist patterns, natural dye color variations
Constraints: all text must be simplified Chinese characters only; layout must include top header with title/subtitle/intro, left structural breakdown with callout lines, upper-right material/texture swatches with descriptions, mid-right pattern/color meaning section with swatches, bottom wearing sequence diagram and feature summary; must maintain encyclopedic museum quality, no commercial poster aesthetics
Avoid: poster aesthetic, studio portrait feel, e-commerce product page style, anime illustration, cosplay aesthetic, messy labels, incorrect structure, blurry text, fake textures, excessive decoration, English text, pinyin, decorative flourishes without function
